component.name: Ásbrú Plus
component.summary: Graphical manager for remote terminal sessions over SSH, RDP, VNC, Telnet and SFTP

description.p: Ásbrú Plus is a community-maintained fork of Ásbrú Connection Manager. It provides a graphical interface for organizing and automating remote terminal sessions over SSH, RDP, VNC, Telnet and SFTP.

ul.li: Tabbed terminal sessions with cluster support
Port forwarding and SOCKS5 proxy support

description.p: Security fixes, Wayland support, PPK key conversion, and dark mode improvements.
